_doc: Tier-1 surface vocabulary glosses. Shown on first encounter inline or via tooltip; folded away after acknowledgement. Locked list per design/shell/05-lore-and-nomenclature.md §2 (Tier 1).

glosses.gloss: Your workspace itself — a personal seat of strength.
Your AI engine, the destiny-driver of this workspace.
The runtime controller that drives your shell.
First-run setup — giving your Ikenga its purpose.

glosses.english: speaking to the Ikenga before ventures
glosses.gloss: The greeting on app open — addressing your Ikenga before today's work.
A consent moment — sharing kola before granting access.
Specialist functionaries — the mini-apps your Ikenga can call on.
Agents — embodied personas that can act autonomously.
Hooks — event listeners that announce when something happens.
